channel.title: IBD LitMonitor - AI & Machine Learning
channel.description: IBD literature monitoring: AI & Machine Learning

item.title: Evolution of Gastrointestinal Inflammatory Diseases and Neoplasm Burden in Super-Elderly Populations: Integrated GBD 2023, CHARLS, and CLHLS Analyses of China and G20 Countries.
item.description: Molecular medicine (Cambridge, Mass.) - Rapid population aging has profoundly altered the epidemiological profile of gastrointestinal diseases in individuals aged ≥75 years. Although enteric infections (EI) have been effectively controll...

item.title: Structure-based machine learning model for discovering pregnane X receptor (PXR) agonists and biological activity validation.
item.description: Archives of toxicology - Pregnane X receptor (PXR), a nuclear receptor superfamily member, maintains bile acid homeostasis by regulating metabolic enzymes [e.g., cytochrome P450 3A4 (CYP3A4), uridine diphosphate glucuronos...

item.title: Integrative Transcriptomic Analysis Identifies Shared Immune-Fibrotic Transcriptional Programs Across Crohn's Disease and Idiopathic Pulmonary Fibrosis.
item.description: International journal of molecular sciences - Idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis (IPF) and Crohn's disease (CD) share overlapping immune and fibrotic processes, yet their convergent molecular mechanisms remain poorly defined. Here, we performed an ...
